title: aspidium auriculatum var. lentum
intro: Aspidium auriculatum var. lentum, also known as the 'flexible or hanging spleenwort', is a variety of the Aspidium auriculatum fern species. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aspidium auriculatum var. lentum include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be supervised by a medical professional.
